title: Quick note to telephone number to add the person's name
excerpt: Hi! It would be nice to make a quick note to a telephone number where you can write the name of the person the phone number belongs to without having to add another column making the board even longer.

posts.author: Anky (Anky Van Wesenbeeck)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! It would be nice to make a quick note to a telephone number where you can write the name of the person the phone number belongs to without having to add another column making the board even longer.
